creator: info@rickvanderzwet.nl
text:
While booting it is not clear what kind of error is encountered. Is there an input error, read error or something else? This small patch suggest a few additions to the error handling (enabled during compile time)

Fix: Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Boot a machine and just see one '#' appearing and try to guess if the error is the input device (serial,ps/2, usb keyboard),wrongly pressed key, disk read error or misconfiguration in boot block 'magic'.
